creator: royger@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Andrew Lindh from comment #7)
Grant allocation is not fully static, in other words: a PV device might use a high amount of grants for a short period in order to cope with a data transfer spike and then release them, that's why most code is designed to wait for grants to be released.

That being said, when devices are attached unable to meet the number of grants required for static setup should just cause an error and the device shouldn't be initialized.  I will see about providing a patch to do that.
